body.title: Review all CC skills — enforce discipline at step-switch boundaries
body.result: Skill system overhauled: /slate, /slateclose, /readigor created; /decided rewritten as planning ritual; /savestate +compact string output; /sprint +test-fix→probe→audit chain; /day-close restructured. cc_queue sort bug fixed.
body.description: Skills have drifted: step switches/gates exist in the skill files but Claude often skips them in practice. Review each skill together (Akien + Claude), tighten the gates that matter, remove dead steps. Candidate skills: savestate, day-close, decided, workstep, commit, sprint, context-load.
